title: Pyroscope Admin — Errors, Rejections & Operations
description: Deep admin dashboard for Pyroscope operators. Covers errors (4xx/5xx), profile rejections, request volumes by route, latency analysis, write-path failures, and discarded profiles across clusters and namespaces.

panels.description: Percentage of all requests returning 4xx or 5xx status codes
panels.title: Error Rate %

panels.description: Rate of 5xx server errors per second across all Pyroscope routes
panels.title: 5xx / sec

panels.description: Rate of 4xx client errors per second across all Pyroscope routes
panels.title: 4xx / sec

panels.description: Total request rate per second across all Pyroscope endpoints
panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: Percentage of requests completing with 2xx status codes
panels.title: Success %

panels.description: 95th percentile request latency across all Pyroscope routes
panels.title: P95 Latency

panels.description: Time series of error counts broken down by HTTP status code (4xx and 5xx classes)
panels.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code

panels.description: Overall error rate percentage over time, showing the ratio of failed requests to total requests
panels.title: Error Rate % Over Time

panels.description: Top 10 routes generating the most 5xx server errors, ranked by error rate
panels.title: Top 10 Routes — 5xx Errors

panels.description: Top 10 routes generating the most 4xx client errors, ranked by error rate
panels.title: Top 10 Routes — 4xx Errors

panels.description: Error rate percentage broken down by cluster to identify which clusters have the highest failure rates

targets.expr: sum by (cluster) (rate(pyroscope_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"$route", status_code=~"4..|5.."}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (cluster) (rate(pyroscope_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"$route"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Error Rate by Cluster

panels.description: Total request rate per second broken down by cluster, showing traffic distribution
panels.title: Request Rate by Cluster

panels.description: Profiles discarded by Pyroscope broken down by rejection reason (e.g., rate limiting, validation failures, capacity limits)
panels.title: Discarded Profiles

panels.description: Rate of HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) responses indicating rate limiting is actively rejecting traffic
panels.title: Rate Limited (429)

panels.description: Comparison of total profiles received versus profiles successfully accepted (2xx), highlighting the gap caused by rejections
panels.title: Profiles Received vs Accepted

panels.description: Top 15 Pyroscope routes ranked by total request volume, identifying the busiest endpoints
panels.title: Top 15 Routes by Volume

panels.description: Stacked request rate over time broken down by route, showing traffic distribution patterns
panels.title: Request Rate by Route

panels.description: Errors on write/ingest path routes (push, ingest) broken down by route and status code
panels.title: Write Path Errors

panels.description: Write path errors broken down by HTTP status code to distinguish between client errors and server failures
panels.title: Write Errors by Status Code

panels.description: 95th percentile request latency ranked by route to identify the slowest endpoints
panels.title: P95 Latency by Route

panels.description: Latency percentiles (P50, P90, P95, P99) over time across all selected routes showing overall Pyroscope request performance
panels.title: Latency Percentiles (P50 / P90 / P95 / P99)
